facebook.content:
My dear child, I want you to remember that you are not defined by your circumstances. You are a beloved child of God, and His love for you is not dependent on your success or failure. Your worth is not determined by the opinions of others, but by the fact that you carry the image of God within you.

You are a masterpiece, created to bring glory to the One who formed you. Don't let the enemy whisper lies into your ear, telling you that you're not enough.
facebook.cta:
Learn more about our mission
https://increasingfaith.net/about.html

facebook.pullQuote: My dear child, I want you to remember that you are not defined by your circumstances.

instagram.content:
Son or daughter, when the storms of life rage against you, remember: your strength isn't in the calm, it's in the One who calms the storm. You don't have to be strong, you just have to be still. Trust in the Lord, and He will be your peace.

You are not alone, and you are not a stranger to the heart of God. He knows you, He loves you, and He will carry you through every trial.
